hot: The metal glowed after hours in the forge.
Steam rose from the kettle as the water boiled.
The asphalt shimmered under the midday sun.
She pulled on oven mitts before opening the tray.
The desert wind felt like a blast furnace.
Molten glass flowed like honey in the workshop.
The radiator warmed the room all night.
The soup was too warm to sip quickly.
Fresh lava hardened as it cooled on the slope.
He wiped sweat from his brow in the heat.
The campfire kept everyone comfortable after dusk.
A heatwave lingered over the city for days.
The iron bar was too warm to touch bare-handed.
She opened the car door and felt a wave of warmth.
The greenhouse trapped warmth for the plants.
The sauna air was thick and heavy.
Hot sand burned her feet at the beach.
The engine casing was warm after the long drive.
The tea steamed in the chilly morning.
The bakery smelled of fresh bread from the oven.
cold: Frost covered the grass before dawn.
Ice formed along the edges of the lake.
He pulled his coat tighter in the biting wind.
The glass was chilled from the fridge.
Snow crunched under their boots.
Her fingers went numb on the winter walk.
The metal railing felt icy to the touch.
A thin layer of ice coated the windshield.
The cellar air was brisk and damp.
They huddled near the window to escape the chill.
The mountain air was crisp and thin.
He shivered as the storm moved in.
The frozen peas rattled inside the bag.
She wrapped the scarf high against the cold.
The river surface crusted over overnight.
His breath fogged in the air.
The ice pack was numbingly cold.
The shade was cool even at noon.
The freezer door creaked open.
The night air had a sharp chill.

hot: Ferrum in fornace canduit post horas multas.
Aqua in aene fervebat et vapor surgebat.
Arena sub sole meridiano ardebat.
In balneo vaporis aer gravis et calidus erat.
Ventus deserti quasi fornax flabat.
Lapis prope ignem calorem retinebat.
Panis e furno recens redolebat.
Liquor in calice fumabat.
Sol in meridie vias calefecit.
Metallum ad tactum calidum erat.
Il metallo si e' arroventato nella fornace.
Il sole bruciava sull'asfalto.
L'acqua bolliva nella pentola.
Aire beroak hiria estaltzen zuen.
Harkaitzak su ondoan bero zeuden.
Ilma oli paahtavan kuuma auringossa.
Kiuas hohkasi kuumuutta saunassa.
L'air etait brulant dans la rue.
La pierre chauffee irradiait.
El motor estaba caliente al tacto.
cold: Pratum pruina ante lucem tectum erat.
Glacies ad margines lacus formata est.
Ventus hibernus acerrimus erat.
Metalum ad tactum frigidum erat.
Aeris frigus ossa pervadit.
Flumen nocte gelu contexit.
Digitis rigebat propter frigus.
Nix sub pedibus crepuit.
Aurora gelida fuit.
Aer nocturnus asper erat.
L'aria era gelida all'alba.
Il vetro era freddo dal frigo.
La neve scricchiolava sotto i passi.
Haize hotzak aurpegia mozten zuen.
Ibaia izoztu zen gauean.
Ilma oli hyytava aamuauringossa.
Kadulla oli pureva pakkanen.
L'air etait glacial au matin.
La glace couvrait les marches.
El aire estaba helado al amanecer.

hot: The soup steamed gently in the bowl.
She burned her fingers on the hot stove.
The sand scorched her bare feet at the beach.
Lava inched slowly down the hillside.
He scalded his tongue on the boiling coffee.
The iron was far too hot to touch.
Sparks flew from the forge as the smith worked.
The desert sun made the rocks unbearable to touch.
Steam billowed from the volcanic hot spring.
The pan sizzled when she dropped in the butter.
Sweat dripped from his forehead in the midday heat.
The oven door radiated warmth when opened.
The engine block was scorching after the long race.
Flames leapt from the bonfire into the night sky.
The asphalt shimmered in the summer heat.
She wrapped her hands around the steaming mug.
The sauna was thick with heat and humidity.
Molten steel poured from the ladle in bright streams.
He flinched when he touched the sunlit car hood.
The fresh loaf crackled warmly from the bakery oven.
The radiator clicked and hissed as it warmed the room.
Smoke curled upward from the smoldering campfire.
Her face flushed red in the sweltering gymnasium.
The desert wind was like breathing from a hair dryer.
The equatorial sun was blinding and ferociously hot.
The copper pipe was painfully hot when water ran through it.
The molten glass glowed orange as the glassblower shaped it.
Baking bread filled the kitchen with warm, yeasty air.
The outdoor grill radiated intense heat across the patio.
The parking lot sizzled under the August afternoon sun.
The welding rod burned white-hot as the seam fused.
His shirt was soaked with sweat from the summer construction work.
The pottery kiln glowed brick-red at peak temperature.
She pressed a warm towel against her sore shoulder.
The tropical afternoon air was thick and suffocating.
Magma pushed upward through the fractured rock.
The cast iron skillet retained heat long after the flame died.
His skin reddened under the relentless July sun.
The warm exhaust from the vent made the alley stifling.
The tea kettle whistled as the water reached a full boil.
He drank the broth while it was still scalding hot.
The sunlit stone wall was too hot to lean against.
The thermometer climbed past forty degrees in the valley.
Steam pressure built steadily inside the sealed boiler.
The freshly paved road was soft and sticky from the heat.
They roasted marshmallows over the glowing embers.
The tropical greenhouse was a wall of humid, heavy air.
He kept his coffee mug on the warmer so it stayed hot.
The broiler element glowed orange-red inside the oven.
Smoke from the wildfire hung over the valley like a blanket.
The metal bleachers burned anyone who sat on them at noon.
The furnace roared as it melted down the scrap metal.
A heat wave kept temperatures above thirty-eight for a week.

The sun-facing wall of the building was too hot to touch.
The volcanic crater vented sulfurous heat into the air.
The skillet was still smoking when she plated the steak.
The summer asphalt was soft enough to leave footprints.
The spa pool was almost too warm to stay in for long.
The car interior was suffocating after sitting in the sun.
The burning logs crackled and sent sparks upward.
Children yelped crossing the hot pavement in bare feet.
Hot springs bubbled at the foot of the volcanic mountain.
The thermal suit protected the technician from radiant heat.
Steam rose from the pot as soon as the lid came off.
The midday sun turned the urban canyon into an oven.
The foundry floor shimmered with rising thermal waves.
She could feel the heat radiating through the glass door.
The sun-warmed stones held their heat well into the evening.
He pressed his cold hands around the warm coffee cup.
The charcoal was glowing red and ready for grilling.
The scalding shower finally loosened the tension in his back.
The chili bubbled furiously on the stove.
The match flared briefly before settling into a steady flame.
Humid tropical heat pressed down on the jungle canopy.
The smelting plant was a wall of furnace-like heat inside.
She winced as she poured boiling water into the jar.
The lava field crinkled and smoked as fresh rock oozed out.
The branding iron glowed orange before it touched the wood.
The thermal camera showed everything above sixty degrees glowing red.
cold: The soup was ice-cold by the time she sat down.

Frost stiffened the wet towel left outside overnight.
Glaciers advanced slowly down the mountain valley.

Icy mist rose from the frozen surface of the mountain lake.

The water tap ran cold long before it ever ran warm.
He gulped the icy water after the long run.
The stone bench in the shadow was unbearably cold to sit on.
The thermometer dropped below minus fifteen overnight.
Pressure dropped in the pipe as it passed through the frozen section.
The freshly laid road cracked in the overnight frost.

The cold greenhouse barely protected the plants from frost.

Snow smothered the dying embers within minutes.

Cold air fell out of the chest freezer as soon as it was opened.
The winter wind turned the city canyon into a freezing tunnel.
The frozen tundra showed no signs of thawing.

The frozen stones took all day to thaw in the weak winter sun.
He pressed his warm hands around the cold water glass.

The cold shower jolted him awake with an icy rush.
The stew had gone cold and was congealing in the pot.
